extraction.ocr_text:
## Final Reminder
Always identify the correct domain (invoices, ServiceNow
incidents, or Orchestrator jobs), call the right tool(s),
present results in a clean human-readable format, and
offer relevant follow-up actions.

Cancel
Accept
extraction.description: This screenshot shows a modal or confirmation dialog in the UiPath Studio Web/Agent Builder context with a final reminder message about agent behavior. The dialog emphasizes choosing the correct domain, using the appropriate tools, formatting results clearly, and suggesting follow-up actions. The Accept button is highlighted with a red border, indicating the intended next action.
extraction.step_instructions:
1. Review the final reminder message in the dialog.
2. Click on the highlighted Accept button to confirm and proceed.
